schema: This file is a STUB. Each provider entry contains a `how_to_populate` field with the exact command to run on your own hardware/account. After running, the harness writes the populated entry back in place. Only update via `henchmen eval --provider <name> --write-baseline` or via .github/workflows/evals.yml — do not hand-edit scores. See evals/README.md for the methodology.

openai.notes: Stub — populate via the command above or via the evals.yml workflow_dispatch.

anthropic.notes: Stub — populate via the command above or via the evals.yml workflow_dispatch.

vertex.how_to_populate: gcloud auth application-default login && HENCHMEN_GCP_PROJECT_ID=my-proj henchmen eval --provider vertex --all --write-baseline
vertex.notes: Stub — populate via the command above. Requires a GCP project with Vertex AI enabled.

ollama.how_to_populate: ollama serve & ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:14b && HENCHMEN_LLM_OLLAMA_MODEL=qwen2.5-coder:14b henchmen eval --provider ollama --all --write-baseline
ollama.notes: Stub — populate via the command above. Requires a local Ollama server with a tool-calling-capable model (qwen2.5-coder:7b+, deepseek-r1:8b+, or llama3.1:8b+).

bedrock.notes: Stub — populate via the command above. Requires AWS credentials with access to Bedrock invoke.
